metadata.falPrompt:
13th century Florence, Ponte Vecchio, view from riverbank. 
Covered bridge over the Arno River, small shops built along 
its sides, wooden overhangs, stone arches reflected in dark 
water below. Dusk light, cool blue-gray shadows, warm amber 
from shop windows. Quiet, isolated, slightly uneasy mood. 
Hand-painted illustration style, aged fresco texture, 
muted Tuscan palette. No fantasy elements, no modern details.
